---
title: "Integrations Overview"
---

<CardGroup cols={1}>
  <Card
    title="HubSpot"
    href="/integrations/hubspot"
    icon={<svg width="36" height="36" viewBox="0 0 36 36" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
<rect width="500" height="500" fill="url(#pattern0)"/>
<defs>
<pattern id="pattern0" patternContentUnits="objectBoundingBox" width="1" height="1">
<use xlink:href="#image0_1665_153194" transform="scale(0.002)"/>
</pattern>
<image id="image0_1665_153194" width="36" height="36" xlink:href="data:image/png;base64,"/>
</defs>
</svg>
}>
HubSpot is a CRM platform that connects everything scaling companies need to deliver a best-in-class customer experience into one place.
    </Card>

  <Card
    title="Salesforce"
    href="/integrations/salesforce"
    img="https://static.getlancey.com/integrations/salesforce.png">Salesforce CRM brings companies and customers together.</Card>

  <Card
    title="Slack"
    href="/integrations/slack"
    img="https://static.getlancey.com/integrations/slack.png">Slack is a messaging app for business that connects people to the information they need.</Card>

</CardGroup>
